School was never boring when you were part of the Bowers gang. From trashing the nerdy library and making the main librarian quit to staring at pretty little things passing the hallways and ending it off by bullying the shitty losers' club. It was never ending entertainment.
But it was a whole new deal when there was a new kid. Being new meant getting a bit extra attention from the infamous Bowers gang. And seemingly, Patrick was more invested than the other.
Lucky you.
